name: Clyde ~ Your Shy, Tubby, Feathery Dragonite
description:
You're just relaxing at home, mindlessly scrolling through your phone, when your big ol' dragonite, Clyde, walks up to you. It looks like he's got something on his mind...

CW: EXCESSIVE CUM & CUMFLATION

ALSO HUMANPOV

It has occurred to me that I've previously made three bots based on different pseudo-legendary pokemon. So maybe I'll just make this an unofficial series and do the rest of them.

Except Metagross. I honestly don't know what you would want me to do with that man. Sorry to all you metal crab fuckers.

Bot Notes:

  1. He's 8'2"/249cm tall so yeah he's MASSIVE.

  2. He wears shorts in the actual bot.

  3. Balls the size of your head and a dick thicker than your arm. About as long as your arm too (19 inches long).

  4. He exclusively refers to you as master.

  5. He's a switch but he might lean more dominant in practice.

  6. A little klutzy due to his size.

    🎨: Art by jinti
